reviews.review_text: Lincoln was very helpful and friendly at checkin. All staff friendly and a great location for day trips.
A great budget friendly option just outside Hobart. The staff were wonderful.
Good place to stay close to Hobart & the airport, with comfortable cabins at an affordable price. If noise is an issue not great as you are right next to the freeway, but I slept alright.
Good location, and it would be even better if there were a playground.
The cabins are clean and comfortable

Lovely caravan park not too far from Hobart City. Definitely worth the short drive if you're looking for budget accommodation. Well maintained cabins and camp ground. It had everything we needed during our getaway. Check in was seamless. Thank you for a great place to stay during our Tassie trip!

Katastrophaler Lärm durch die Autobahn.
Keine Heizung im Raum.
Zimmer war sauber.
Man kann direkt vor dem Häuschen parken.
good locati0n. clean

Because of the bad experience I had 2 years back, I hesitated initially and went with my booking since it was reasonable for a cabin for 3. And this time, I definitely see an improved service. Keep up. They have public bus service next door.
Pas mal mais dommage que la table du Bungalow familial soit minuscule
Spacious cabin for four of us. Everything you need is available. Very close to city (7mins). Very happy with our stay.
고속도로 소음만 빼면 정말 좋아요.

Ok .. we started our Tasmania trip in Hobart at discovery parks.  We stayed in an economy cabin that could sleep 4.  Don’t bother booking if it’s 4 adults, there’s barely enough room to swing a cat in there. The bathroom/toilet was tiny and the overall decor of the cabin was old and dated. The parking spaces are barely big enough for a small car.  We had a family with a small motor home in the parking spot next to our cabin that every time they used it they bumped the side of our cabin on the bedroom side.  NOT ideal.   It was clean enough and served the purpose for our first 2 nights.  We reluctantly came back for our last night and were equally disappointed.  The actual cabin was a little better with the toilet and bathroom separate (still very squishy).  However the bunk bed were kids bunks despite booking for 4 adults.  Also the noise at night was not ideal both noise from the highway and general noise from the other guests (driving at all hours, talking and carrying on at all hours). Sad because it is a great spot.
Noisy as near road. Just for sleep. Nothing special.
good place for holiday

The most diabolical nights sleep me and my partner have ever had. Walking in, the room smelt heavily of mold. The bed was so uncomfortable and we could hear the cars buzzing past on the highway all night. Facilities were good however, only reason we are complaining is for the price you would expect at least a decent bed.
Clear instructions from staff for after-hour key collection. Decent price. Had an excellent sleep. 10min drive from airport. Ideal 👍 thanks

If you want a good nights sleep do not stay here
The park is beside Hobart busiest freeway and the traffic noise doesn’t stop till 100am and starts back at 5.00 am
Lovely little park. 10 mins by car to Hobart city. Standard cabin was comfortable & warm.
Excellent communication. Clean practical room. Great shower.

I recently booked this accommodation for my life companion for 2 nights. He was going to attend an event for his Grandson, and when this event was cancelled, I phoned to cancel the booking. When I spoke to the consultant, I was told that there was a cancellation fee, even though I cancelled 5 days before the date of the booked accommodation. The total for the booking was 2 nights including a credit card fee was $380.39. The cancellation fee was $188.50, which amounted to 1 night's accommodation for the selcted cabin at the park. This is totally unreasonable, given that I gave 5 days notice for the cancellation. This cancellation fee is also totally unreasonable, as there is no apparent information on the booking site about fees for cancellation. I will never book at this place again

We stayed for 2 nights as a family of 4. We found the rooms were clean, comfortable & budget friendly. The staff were quick to fix a hot water issue within minutes. Will stay again when we return to Hobart.
Excellent spot for a few days break
Dated budget cabin.

Location was good as it was close to Hobart, it's old but clean  the laundry is great nice new machines
The staff was very friendly
Convenient location, close to all amenities, easy access, well appointed at a budget price. Used them for 40 years and can highly recommend.

Run as fast as you can!!

Full of mould, traffic and emergency services near by with constant alarms…..

Poor cleaning, minimal towels or suppliers.

Dishonest advertising for businesses on cabin sizes.

Cleaners leaving doors unlocked with and stolen items from the room
Ill never stay at another discovery park again
舒適、整潔, 電子爐、烤箱一應俱全、鍋子、碗盤也都很乾淨, 訂的2房間也都很不錯, 離機場、超商近, 很方便~
Great spot

We have stayed here previously, always finding all the staff friendly and helpful. This time, we had a caravan site for the first time and it was spacious and well-serviced by facilities. I especially wanted, though, to talk up the shower! There was fabulous heat and water pressure 🚿  so I feel a lot more human again 😉
It's an OK place to stay, outdated and some of the fixtures are worn.

We recently stayed at Discovery Parks – Hobart on a powered site with a private en-suite, and we were really impressed. Everything was exceptionally clean, including the en-suite bathroom and the camp kitchen.

The camp kitchen was well equipped with a toaster, electric oven with built-in cooktop, and a kettle. There’s also a dining table / TV area, which made it a really comfortable space to relax and enjoy meals. While there weren’t any cooking utensils or crockery provided, that wasn’t an issue for us as we brought our own.

It was a nice medium-sized campsite, and we also appreciated the thoughtful touches like floor mats. Overall, a very comfortable and well-maintained place to stay—we’d happily return.

We stayed in a cabin 4 nights here.||Very friendly and helpful reception.||Very quiet park close to Hobart CBD.||The parking is beside your cabin.||Good size bed, comfortable but for one thing, it had roll together. Still managed a good night's sleep all nights though.||Cabin is smallish but adequate, with full stove, oven, microwave, all the cooking utensils etc, kettle with coffee tea etc. Milk in the fridge. Dining table with 4 chairs and a sofa. Separate toilet, bathroom and again a small shower but good volume of water. 4 x bunk beds so cabin can sleep 6. Aircon but we needed heater for the night as it was chilly.||TV with standard channels. Had a little trouble with the antenna cable but sorted that out. ||Cabin has everything you'd need.
I’m very grateful to Mel and the Team at discovery for allowing me to check in early due to health reasons. Really thankful they were willing to accomodate my needs 🙏
Had fantastic time with my 2 year old plenty of things too do. The cabin was outstanding meet every need. Will definitely back 😁 reception lady was so lovely 🙂 made you feel very welcome

We stayed in a deluxe two bedroom cabin and it was absolutely beautiful. It had everything we needed and more. The best cabin we've stayed in in Tasmania. The staff were very friendly and helpful, they gave us lots of ideas and advice for places to visit while in Hobart. Great location, not to close to the main town of Hobart. Only negative was the main road close by but after 6pm you didn't hear much traffic.
wonderful staff and cozy room

My wife, sister and baby went there for a couple nights, currently still there. Can not say enough about the service already. The staff went out of there way to get them in before usual check in time, helped them both with there bags, unloaded it for them and even took them up to the room on a buggy to make it easier for them with my daughter. Absolutely blown away by the service and will 100% be staying here every single time we come back down to Tasmania

Good location and staff were very friendly and helpful. We did have an issue with our hot water which was annoying and as we only stayed one night I don’t know if that was fixed. Would happily go back here though as it’s in a good spot for access to Hobart and surrounds and staff were excellent.
Nice cozy quiet place for family, bunk beds have windows and good to feel morning sunshine. Bbq place is clean and easy to use. Friendly staff. Bar and bottle shop are at next door.
Great location so close to everything, had an ensuite site which was roomy and clean. Lovely staff

Bed mattress was on a downward angle which made it hard to sleep (blood rush to head). Bathrooms were  a bit on the pokey side. Ants seen inside a few times, overall average, what you would expect for a holiday park.
We stayed for three nights in a deluxe spa room.  The room was in great condition. Clean and comfortable.  Location is great.
Cosy place to stay.
Great value. Only downside is the occasional traffic noise from the adjacent highy
Lovely clean and well stocked self contained cabins. They had freshened the room and had the heater on before we arrived and the beds were comfortable. Good amenities with a nice central location.
旅行期間住了數晚，炊煮設備便利

Good place to stay if you are visiting and dont need a fancy place. Rooms and beds were clean and had all basic items required. Internet wasnt great so kids were a little unhappy but we were out most of the time so didnt really have an issue. Check in and out was very simple and quick. Recommended for budget accommodation!

Arrived after the reception close i had not received the key box code. Used the after hours phone, no a swer, left a message. My friend called both the numbers listed on the signature, no answer, left messages. Ended up having to book elsewhere. Contacted for a refund. Was told I was a liar and there was no messages or missed calls from us despite our phone and gps logs proving our story. Dodgy so stay anywhere but here.

I visited this place with my wife and 2 kids and was really disappointed. They charge around 150 per day but the kind of room I got was really small. The bunk bed sheet and mattress protector seems to have been changed or clean. It has all kind of stain and some dirt on top of it looks like it was cockroaches egg. The lady in the reception was helpful and she change that for me. To add to our experience I found some chicken bones and dirty cutlery. When I told the staff they seems like I am being too much demanding and I should expect these things when going to caravan park. Never ever going back to this place and highly not recommend this place to any one.
Everything you need, really clean, really quiet. Great place for an overnight stay.

Very clean
Easy parking
Laundry options
Closer to Hobart
Small kitchenette for quick meals

Grounds keeper complained multiple times about driving too fast when we were not. Don't know what his problem was but it was very frustrating as him and the office lady went out of the way to make a big fuss about it and call our boss. I'm guessing they were bored and had nothing better to do. Also last week the shower drain was blocked and flooded the bathroom in a different cabin and as a builder I could see that the shower was not waterproofed properly.

We have a very comfortable cabin..
Service is very good

Stayed for the first time the past weekend and was very pleased.. the price was great. Room was very clean and alot more spacious then I thought it would of been. The grounds are nice and neat and check in and out was a breeze. Will be staying again :)
Close to airport and walking distance to a nice Tavern.

I just love the theme of discovery parks. This just feels like home with kitchen, dinning and small living area inside a cabin. Of course the cabin differs as per preferences and money but yea it was all good. It is just adjacent to the main highway but i could not hear noises at night, slept peacefully. A little bit upgrade with the AC heating would be great.

I would like to thank all the staff for their compassion commitment and dedication to making our stay comfortable when we were going through a difficult time with our pet Sydney they went above and beyond to help us thanks Michael for understanding our situation and all the other staff it meant the world to Shane and I

My experience with this park is horrible.
We travelled across Tasmania with the family and dogs in the car. Super excited for our holiday in Hobart.
Unfortunately it didn't last very long as the park cancelled our accommodation 20 minutes before check-in because of weather conditions.
They promised us a refund so we can find another accommodation, on a Friday evening on school holidays. Well... No money until five days later, we had to drive all the way back again.
Very disappointing as they could just had cancelled our booking in the morning (or the day before) so we didn't have to take time off work and travel all the way for nothing.
I have contacted the park for some kind of reimbursement but all I got was sorry for the inconvenience.

Managed to move 2 of my 3 bookings but they couldnt manage to move my own booking, after having that problem resolved they upgraded us to a powered ensuite site, which unfortunately had basically no water pressure to almost no hot water. I wouldnt recommend staying here at all, and if you get upgraded to powered site 6 with ensuite you'd be better of cancelling your booking
Wonderful warm and helpful staff, good setting close to most services

Friendly staff. Location suited our purposes of travelling all around the wider Hobart area but was a little noisy because of the highway. I did not realise it was across the road from a prison until after booking, but lots of trees improved the view. Kids enjoyed the play area. Room was clean. Appreciate the washing machine in the room, but upgrading to washer/dryers would be helpful
. Also an awning/roof over the decking so guests can spread out more no matter the weather would be good.
We had a lovely relaxing and surprisingly comfortable weekend ☺️
Accessible by car to all the things we wanted. Staff were very helpful on check in. Amenities for an ensuite powered site were really great condition.

We had a 1 night stay here in a campervan.  The sites were very small, no room to open our awning and sit outside. Location of the Taps for water supply not ideal. There was no grey water drain either.
And whats with the no TV reception???
But the park itself was very clean and well presented and maintained.
Kurt at reception was extremely friendly and welcoming.

The park is close to shopping facilities and attractions of Hobart. The room itself is comfortable and private however we found the small single beds and a simple double to be too small to get comfortable at night. Parking is available in front or beside the cabin. The cabin we had was excellent with a faux fireplace that had me mesmerised like watching fish in a tank and a large screen TV. It can be a little noisy as it's right up high over the highway.

I love this place. Had to extend my stay and was moved to another unit. Both units were lovely. All cabins have wheel chair access the second unit is disability friendly. The owners have thought of everything. Some of the units are pet friendly with little yards.  About 1/2 hour away from Hobart. The reception staff are the best. The grounds are well maintained and there is a fire pit at one.  Huge playground for the kids as well.

I stayed at the Risdon Discovery Park for two nights on a powered ensuite site.

The service was fantastic with quick responses and clear instructions. We arrived after staffed hours but check in was easy, with a text with the instructions, key location and codes. The following day, we realised we had forgotten to bring our towels, I popped down to reception to ask if we could have some which they were more then happy to provide.

The powered ensuit sites are very small, except #4. If there had been people in Spaces 1, 2, & 5, we would not have been able to get into space 3. Definitely require small set ups!

It was convenient having our own toilet and shower, however, these amenities could use a face lift. Lots of hot water however no heating in the bathroom, poor ventilation from the fan and whilst it was clean, it looked dirty from cracked paints, joins etc.

In short, we would stay again.
Stayed here for 3 nights in our camper van. Facilities where clean and pleasant with convenient access to Hobart. Outside hours check-in/out was simple and hassle free.

I stayed here many times during my trip around Tassie. Absolutely loved it! The camping site with ensuite was perfect for my car camping set up. The staff are so friendly and helpful here and I was impressed with their facilities. It was everything I needed and more. I would definitely stay here again next time I am in Tassie. Thanks Discovery Parks Hobart ❤️

Would give 10 starts if I could! Right from check in the hospitality is so warm and welcoming, very knowledgeable which is great for tourists and so kind and accommodating! My little QLD babies couldn't handle the tassy weather and were unwell, the ladies out the front were so helpful offering extra supplies and anything they could do to help. We had the deluxe cabin which is absolutely beautiful and so well set up, we could comfortably stay and cook all of our own meals in the kitchen - also LOVE that it had a dishwasher! Not many places we stayed at did so that was a bonus for mum! The room was very clean and fresh! Loved the location - no more than 20 mins away from anything we needed! Would definitely come back, highly recommended!!

Book deluxe cabin mostly for washer and dryer. Thanks all appliances were working and cabin was well stocked.
However wifi is really bad and not work inside the cabin. However cabin was comfortable
Caravan sites are generous. Close to Bellreve & Hobart.

We had a 2 bed cabin.  Roomy, large kitchen with every facility.  Lounge area with fireplace (electric) and A-C, washing machine and dryer in room.  Large verandah.  Excellent facilities.  Noisy on verandah, but not in unit.  Staff very friendly and recommended lots of sights to see
Accommodation is suitable for all occasions and located just outside Hobart

Perfect! Very kind and friendly staff. Have been overwhelming easy to deal with after multiple changes needed on our end due to flight issues, etc. Highly recommended great facilities available for powered site. Hope to be back again soon. Thanks
Lovely place to stay,staff are awesome 👌 this park is handy for everything.

Car camped at one of the ensuite sites for two nights. Nice to have a private bathroom, which was clean and well-equipped.  The park staff were friendly and helpful and it was a quiet and restful stay - you would never know you were so close to a busy road.
Camp kitchen had a fridge to keep cold stuff and a handy microwave to heat quickly.
Felt very safe travelling solo and would definitely stay again.
Lovely place to stay

We booked a deluxe cabin, and it was fabulous! It had everything you wanted plus more, a washing machine, a dryer,  even a dishwasher! The staff were very helpful and friendly, and the location was great for both Hobart and Richmond. The price was comparable to other cabins we have stayed in whilst in Tasmania. We would definitely stay again.

Rang for a price for a caravan powered site. Person on the phone went round and round in circles, couldn't give a price then hung up on me. We aren't tourists we are locals. Wouldn't recommend if that's their attitude

Very considerate staff & management with requests thanks👊
Clean & tidy cabins with good facilities, beds and pillows, AC and heating for all conditions☺️
Convenient location on highway for easy access, can be some noise from loud vehicles on freeway if your sensitive to that, earplugs😉
Hotel out front has good food & service too👍

Good base point for our 9 days of discovering south Tasmania and celebrating the cultural "musts" Port Arthur, Royal Tasmanian Botanical Gardens, etc.  "Superior" Cottage is great value for families - wonderful Master bdrm & a far room with 4 bunks.  Although situated near a noisy highway, the immediate cabin areas are quiet and the site is safe with restricted access.  Staff are pleasant and helpful.  I DO recommend for long stays.

Comfortable and spacious cabin. In-room washer and dryer was a bonus. Rooms could have been a little cleaner. Great facilities for kids. The location was noisy from traffic given it was located on a highway.

- Charles W.

Very disappointed. The kids facilities are very over grown. Paid almost $700 for 3 nights in a Cabin with an oven that doesn’t close, a tiny fry pan to service a family meal and no tongs in the kitchen. We were very much looking forward to our stay and have been very let down.
Nice park and nicely equipped cabins. Would stay here again.

Loved our stay at the Discovery Parks- Hobart.
We will definitely stay next time.
We played cricket today for boxing day and it was a really great time for everyone to spend time together and meet new people and have some fun!
I've been a few times and staff always pleasant , we stayed in deluxe cabin it was lovely 😍
The toilet paper is amazing on our inner soul, the rooms are really clean and comfortable
Fantastic well run park with great pet friendly policy. The cabins even have enclosed yards just for dogs. We had a great stay!

Can’t speak highly enough of the team that work here. My cabin was fantastic, very clean and my bed was so comfy.
I had plenty of room in and out.
The reception staff were so lovely, always smiling and very kind.
Congrats guys! Keep up the great work that you are doing!
Not to far from Hobart city centre.
I didn’t want to leave.

After hours check in was very easy to follow. We had a powered site near the main gate and it was very level and very private between sites. Facilities were lovely, individual cubicles and well maintained. Near a busy road which was the only downside.
Very accommodating for late arrivals. Facilities were clean and modern. Couldn’t recommend more!
These guys provided my family and our dog a great service when we were evacuated due to flooding. Cabins had everything we needed and were warm, very clean and comfortable beds. Can not fault them.
I didn't like it not good service bad rooms bad location

Staff were brilliant, Location wise- good. We used carvan space with ensuite and loved it. Very convenient.
They have an outside BBQ area , and the kitchen was very neat and clean. But you have to use your own utensils.
And great value for money.
Nice view of the prison from here
Often place my partner and I choose to stay quiet close to city Eastern shore Glenorchy,lovely staff affordable clean accommodation

In Hobart for a business conference. What an absolute gem of a place. Comfortable cabin for myself & young family. Pet friendly as well which was absolutely fantastic. We have a rottweiler, quietest, most placid dog you'll meet, most people judge him by his breed making accommodation hard to find. This place was more than accommodating. Will most certainly be back next time we are in Hobart.
Very clean, friendly and attentive staff,
Incredible value for a very nice clean cabin,  beautiful gardens and facilities! But top on the list of many like us, ITS DOG FRIENDLY!

He
put
the
Taz in Tazmania,
Down in Tazmania,
Down in Tazmania,
We need you!

(Okay, all jokes aside, it was fine)
Very clean and tidy.
Very handy spot work accomodation
great but pricey for cabin

What a great find!
Risdon is a great location being half way between Hobart & Richmond meant there was plenty to do.
With a 6 & 4 year old in tow we were very well looked after and the facilities were perfect.
Plenty of amenities, BBQ & playground area was fantastic and the staff were truly lovely nothing was too much.
Kids area needing work. Jumping pillow out of action - big works being done

Wow. This place is an absolute dive. I've stayed in manyyyyyy caravan parks - this one takes the cake for being the worst. My cabin is disgusting. Pee all over the toilet floor. It's a shame reception is closed, I would've demanded another cabin.
Beautiful ladies to deal with , all staff we were so helping

Service was great. Location was only 15 mins from the centre of Hobart. There are not many sites. Ensuit sites are very small and unusually placed with no space to put an awning out. Aside from this the park was quite nice.

Maintenance issues swiftly sorted out by friendly staff.
Busy highway nearby
Nicely positioned as a base for travel  to all points of the compass...

Perfect location, I was worried being over the east side of Hobart but the location was so central to everything we wanted to visit.
Beautiful staff, very friendly and helpful. We will definitely be back 10/10

Stayed about a week on a powered site. Staff very obliging, the location is perfect to use as a base and explore the Hobart and its surroundings  amenities clean and look new. They accommodate for all ages. Would definitely recommend this park without hesitation

Very nice place to stay..
The cabin had everything we needed
Highly recommended

We had booked into what the park called an ensuite powered site.
We discovered that it was a powered site with shared facilities.
We saw  there were 2 sites which were private ensuites and asked to be relocated. They had no hesitation.
Good concrete blocks with motion sensor lights on the outside of the ensuite. Soap, small hand towels and 2 floor towels were provided. Clean and modern facilities.
Great place for us to stay with kids and a dog, we'll be back!

Just recently stayed here with my two dogs, pet friendly cabin was a breeze to stay in and im glad I could bring my dogs with me i know where to stay when I go down that way for any reason!
Only thing Is apart from how clean the cabin was I wish cleaners to careful eye on skirting boards they were a tad dusty and the air con kept the room nice and warm but for the price and cabin 10/10 definitely recommending this to all my pet loving friends and family if they go that way and get stuck for accomodation
